---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for StreamWizard
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or links that help explain the request.
